# terrible_community_general_sssd_info (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) The action to perform.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `domain` (String) Domain name to check. Required unless `action=domain_list`. When `action=domain_list`, this parameter is ignored and the module returns a list of all configured domains.
- `server_type` (String) Required parameter when `action=active_servers` and `action=list_servers`. Optional and ignored for all other actions. At this point, the module supports ONLY the types `IPA` for FreeIPA servers and `AD`.

### Read-Only

- `domain_list` (String) List of SSSD domains.
- `list_servers` (String) List of servers for the specified domain.
- `online` (String) The online status of the SSSD domain.
- `servers` (String) Active servers for the specified domain and type.
